ac_AI_control_hint.translation: AI: the air conditioner collects outdoor temperature, indoor temperature and humidity, heat resistance of clothing, radiation, air velocity and other parameters to achieve comfort, fast cooling or heating rapidly by one key. Then, it automatically controls the temperature, humidity, air velocity and air direction, supplies “gentle” airflow and “shower-like” cooling, avoids direct cooling airflow and air conditioning disease. Its "floor-type" heating will warm your feet, gives users a comfortable indoor environment in the whole process, and cares for health of the elderly, children and pregnant women.

add_separated_ac.translation:
1. Turn on unit.
2. The remote controller points to the air conditioner and presses the left and right winds for 6 times.Or press the "Sleep" button 8 times in the wire remote controller.
3. When the display shows '77' or the Wi-Fi light will flash.

add_mobile_ac.translation:
1. Turn on the appliance.
2. Press the "SWING" button 6 times on the remote; the buzzer will sound to indicate that your appliance is ready to connect.
3. Proceed when your unit display shows "77".

add_window_ac.translation:
1. Turn on the unit.
2. Press and hold the "Wi-Fi" icon.
3. The Wi-Fi light will begin flashing.

add_dehumidifier_ac.translation:
1. Turn on the unit.
2. Simultaneously press and hold the "mode" and "fan" buttons until you hear the buzzer sound three times.
3. Wait until the display shows "P2."

add_washing_machine.translation: 1. When machine is off, press and hold the two rightmost buttons, at the same time，turn on the machine. 2. Press the "Settings" button to enter the Settings menu and toggle the knob to the "Wi-Fi settings" section. Enter the section by pressing the button. 3. Press the "Wi-Fi On/Off" button and toggle the knob to the option "On\ press the "Save" button. 4. Back to the "Wi-Fi settings" section, press the "Connection setup" button; you have 5  minutes to connect your appliance to the network.

paring_set_up_appliance_label.translation: Set up appliance home Wi-Fi settings and pair it to your account.

paring_appliances_label.translation: Pair the appliance with your account. The appliance has your home Wi-Fi settings already set up.

device_not_PAIR_mode.translation: The device does not enter PAIR mode

add_appliance_duplicate_binding.translation: The device is already paired with XXX

firmware_fail_hint.translation: The firmware update process was not successful. Please try again later. If this error repeats several times, you can create a service ticket. Your appliances will continue to function as usual.

firmware_update_title.translation: The latest firmware is already installed on all appliances.

firmware_update_sub_title.translation: We update appliance firmware regularly to improve your experience. Get the latest features by updating the firmware.

add_washing_machine_pair.translation: 1. When machine is off, press and hold the two rightmost buttons, at the same time, turn on the machine. 2. Press “Settings” button to enter Setting menu and toggle the knob to the “Wi-Fi settings” section. Enter the section by pressing the button. 3. In “Wi-Fi settings” section, toggle the knob to find and press the “Add device” button. 4. You have 3 minutes to add the device.

reset_the_timer_after_you_have_cleaned_t.translation: Reset the timer after cleaning the filter.

timer_info.translation: Once you have cleaned the filter, reset the timer to get cleaning notifications.

pind_config_wifi_step2.translation: Tap and hold the Wi-Fi symbol for 3 seconds to enter the Wi-Fi menu.

pind_config_wifi_step1_pair.translation:
Turn on the hob. If the Wi-Fi symbol is visible, continue to the next step.
No Wi-Fi symbol? 
Turn off the hob, and tap the "on/off" key until you hear a beep and the Wi-Fi symbol appears.

pind_config_wifi_step3_pair.translation: When "C" appears, press the "+" symbol and switch to "P".

pind_config_wifi_step4_pair.translation:
When "P" is displayed, tap the Wi-Fi symbol to start the "Pairing setup mode".
"P" will start to blink.
Click NEXT to continue.

afota_config_step1.translation: Remove the pans from the hob and make sure that the hob is ON. Press any slide with two fingers for 3 seconds.

afota_config_step2.translation: Use the slider to toggle until FoA is displayed.

afota_config_step3.translation: Touch the highlighted slider element for 3 seconds with one finger.

afota_config_step4.translation: Use the slider and toggle to ON.

afota_config_step5.translation: Wait 3 seconds until ON starts blinking.

afota_config_step6.translation: Start the update process via the app.

pair_content_title.translation: Simply pair another user to your device. It's required that your device to be set up and connected to your home network. If not, select the "Connection setup" first.

start_time_invalid_alert.translation: The selected time cannot be earlier than the current time.

end_time_invalid_alert.translation: The selected time cannot be later than the current time.

device_invalid_status.translation: Can't alter the changes while the appliance is running.

filter_reset_hint.translation: Reset the filter indicator. 1. Replace or clean the air filter according to the owner's manual. 2.Reset the memory by continuously pressing the '-' button until the grease filter indicator stops flashing.

wm_device_has_room_hint.translation: The washing machine is assigned to a room.

hood_config_wifi_step1.translation: Set the appliance to standby mode (no running motor). Touch and hold the - (minus) key and timer key simultaneously for approximately 3 seconds. The light symbol goes off.

hood_config_wifi_step2.translation: If Wi-Fi icon is lit you can skip this step. If no Wi-Fi icon is shown: Touch and hold the - (minus) key and timer key simultaneously for approximately 3 seconds. The display will shortly show a blinking "O". Wait for the Wi-Fi symbol to be shown on the display.

hood_config_wifi_step3.translation: Touch and hold the + key and timer key simultaneously for approximately 3 seconds.

hood_config_wifi_step4.translation: Select "S" by navigating with the - key or + key. Confirm "S" by touching the timer key.

hood_config_wifi_step5.translation:
The lighting of all key icons goes off and "S" starts blinking, the network of this appliance is now open to connect to, for 5 minutes.
Click NEXT to continue.

hood_config_wifi_step1_pair.translation: Set the appliance to standby mode (no running motor). Touch and hold the - key and timer key simultaneously for approximately 3 seconds. The light symbol goes off.

hood_config_wifi_step2_pair.translation: If Wi-Fi icon is lit you can skip this step. If no Wi-Fi icon is shown: Touch and hold the - key and timer key simultaneously for approximately 3 seconds. The display will shortly show a blinking "O". Wait for the Wi-Fi symbol to be shown on the display.

hood_config_wifi_step5_pair.translation:
The lighting of all key icons goes off and “P” starts blinking, the network of this appliance is now open for pairing for 3 minutes.
Click NEXT to continue.

cooling_config_wifi_step1.translation: Set the device to normal operating conditions. Tap and hold the Wi-Fi symbol for 3 seconds until you hear a beep. The Wi-Fi symbol will start to blink. You entered the network connection menu.

cooling_config_wifi_step2.translation:
If "02" is displayed, skip this step.
If "0" is displayed, tap the intensive cooling/freezing key to enable Wi-Fi on the device.
The display will briefly show "01" and change to "02" automatically.
Wi-Fi is ready for connection.

cooling_config_wifi_step3.translation:
Navigate with the arrow keys and select "S".
Confirm "S" by tapping the intensive cooling/freezing key.
The intensive cooling/freezing key will start to blink. The device network is now open for connection for 5 minutes.

cooling_config_wifi_step1_pair.translation: Set the device to normal operating conditions. Tap and hold the Wi-Fi symbol for 3 seconds until you hear a beep. The Wi-Fi symbol will start to blink, and "05" will appear. You entered the network connection menu.

cooling_config_wifi_step2_pair.translation: Navigate with the arrow keys and select "P". Confirm "P" by tapping the intensive cooling/freezing key. The intensive cooling/freezing key will start to blink. The device network is now open for pairing for 3 minutes. Click NEXT to continue.

dw_config_wifi_step1.translation: Turn ON the appliance. Navigate with arrow keys to settings. Press MENU icon to enter the settings.

dw_config_wifi_step2.translation: In settings menu find NETWORK and confirm with menu key to enter.

dw_config_wifi_step3.translation:
Navigate to “Activate SoftAP” and confirm with menu key. The network of this appliance is now open to connect to, for 5 minutes.
Click NEXT to continue.

dw_config_wifi_step3_pair.translation: Navigate to “Device pairing” and confirm with menu key.

oven_config_wifi_step1.translation:
Turn on the oven.
Check if the Wi-Fi symbol is visible in the top left corner.
Tap the "plus" symbol in the top left corner of the main screen to open the menu.
Select "SETTINGS".
Select "NETWORK CONNECTION".

oven_config_wifi_step2.translation:
If the Wi-Fi symbol is visible, skip this step.
If the Wi-Fi symbol is not visible, tap "Wi-Fi OFF/ON".
Select "ON" and tap the Confirm key. 
Device Wi-Fi is ready for connection (the Wi-Fi symbol is shown on the main screen).

oven_config_wifi_step3.translation:
Tap "CONNECTION SETUP".
Select "SoftAP (S)" and press the Confirm key.
The countdown timer will pop up.
The device network is now open for connection for 5 minutes. 
Click NEXT to continue.

oven_config_wifi_step2_pair.translation:
Select "Pair (P)" and press the Confirm key.
The countdown timer will pop up.
The device is now ready for pairing for 3 minutes. 
Click NEXT to continue.

hob_config_wifi_step1.translation: To enable the device Wi-Fi, the hob must be in ECO mode (the red light next to the "child lock" button is blinking slowly). Tap and hold the "child lock" key for 5 seconds. A red dot will disappear after the beep. Keep tapping until you hear the beep again and the Wi-Fi symbol appears.

hob_config_wifi_step2.translation: Tap and hold the Wi-Fi key for 5 seconds. An "A" key and "-" and "+" keys will appear.

hob_config_wifi_step3.translation: Using the "-" and "+" keys select "S". It will be shown on the display.

hob_config_wifi_step4.translation:
Confirm "S" by tapping the Wi-Fi key. The Wi-Fi symbol and "S" will blink simultaneously.
Click NEXT to continue.

hob_config_wifi_step2_pair.translation: Tap and hold the Wi-Fi key for 5 seconds. An "A" key and "-" and "+" keys will appear.

hob_config_wifi_step3_pair.translation: Using the "-" and "+" keys select "P". It will be shown on the display.

hob_config_wifi_step4_pair.translation:
Confirm "P" by tapping the Wi-Fi key. The Wi-Fi symbol and "P" will blink simultaneously.
Click NEXT to continue.

combi_config_wifi_step1.translation:
Set the appliance to normal operation.
Touch and hold the Wi-Fi icon for 1 sec to enter Wi-Fi menu. The Wi-Fi symbol is lit.

combi_config_wifi_step2.translation: To enable Wi-Fi on the appliance touch the up arrow on bottom display to change from “OF” to “On”. Confirm Wi-Fi “On” with confirmation key. Touch the up arrow on bottom display and the upper display will show “CS”. Wi-Fi is ready for connection.

combi_config_wifi_step3.translation:
Confirm "CS" by touching the confirm key in between the screens. “CS” and confirm key starts blinking.
On the bottom display a countdown begins; the network of this appliance is now open to connect to, for 5 minutes.
Click NEXT to continue.

combi_pair_step1.translation:
Set the appliance to normal operation.
Touch the Wi-Fi icon to enter Wi-Fi menu.
The Wi-Fi symbol is lit.

combi_pair_step2.translation: Wait 3 seconds, until “CS” is displayed on upper display. Navigate with the arrow keys on upper display to choose ‘P’.

combi_pair_step3.translation:
Confirm ‘P’ by touching the confirm key in between the displays.
Upper display starts blinking; the network of this appliance is now open to connect to, for 5 minutes.
Click NEXT to continue.

appliance_not_in_pairing_mode.translation: Appliance is not in pairing mode! Put appliance to pairing mode and try again.

hood_config_wifi_step4_pair.translation: Select "P" by navigating with the - key and + key. Confirm "P" by touching the timer key.

hood_config_wifi_step3_pair_new.translation: Touch and hold the — key and + key simultaneously for approximately 3 seconds.

atag_hood_type1_wifi_step2_wifioff.translation:

Touch and hold the - (minus) key and timer key simultaneously for approximately 3 seconds to enable Wi-Fi.

please_turn_on_remote.translation: Please turn on remote control on the device.

atag_hood_type1_wifi_step1.translation: Set the appliance to standby mode (no running motor). Touch and hold the - (minus) key and timer key simultaneously for approximately 3 seconds to enter Wi-Fi menu.

atag_hood_type1_wifi_step2.translation: Touch and hold the + (plus) key and timer key simultaneously for approximately 3 seconds. ‘C’ should appear on display.

atag_hood_type1_wifi_step3.translation: Select “C” by navigating with the - key or + key. Confirm “C” by touching the timer key.

atag_hood_type1_wifi_step4.translation:
The lighting of all key icons goes off and “C” starts blinking, the network of this appliance is now open to connect to, for 5 minutes.
Click NEXT to continue.

atag_hood_type1_pair_step1.translation: Set the appliance to standby mode (no running motor). Touch and hold the - (minus) key and timer key simultaneously for approximately 3 seconds.

atag_hood_type1_pair_step3.translation: Select “P” by navigating with the - key or + key. Confirm “P” by touching the timer key.

atag_hood_type1_pair_step4.translation:
The lighting of all key icons goes off and “P” starts blinking, the network of this appliance is now open to connect to, for 3 minutes. 
Click NEXT to continue.

atag_hood_type2_wifi_step2.translation: Press the Wi-Fi button for 3 seconds to turn on Wi-Fi. Speed level 2 and 3 indicators will blink 3 times. The Wi-Fi indicator flashes.

atag_hood_type2_wifi_step3.translation: After 3 seconds it will return to the Wi-Fi menu.

atag_hood_type2_wifi_step5.translation: Confirm Connection setup by touching the timer key. Speed level 2 indicator and the Wi-Fi indicator flash while connecting. This mode will turn off automatically after 5 minutes.

atag_hood_type2_pair_step1.translation: Set the appliance to standby mode (no running motor). Touch and hold the Wi-Fi key for approximately 3 seconds. The Wi-Fi indicator will blink 3 times.

atag_hood_type2_pair_step2.translation: Simultaneously press the + (plus) and timer button for 3 seconds to access 'Connections settings'.

atag_hood_type2_pair_step4.translation:
Activate Pairing mode by touching the timer key. Speed level 3 indicator and the Wi-Fi indicator flash while pairing. This mode will turn off automatically after 3 minutes. 
Click NEXT to continue.

atag_hood_type3_wifi_step1.translation:
If the remote is connected to your hood you can skip this step. 
Within 5 minutes after the hood is plugged into the electricity to connect the remote to the hood touch and hold the “C” and “W” key for approximately 3 seconds. Wait for the lights to blink. Your remote is now connected to the hood.

atag_hood_type3_wifi_step2.translation: The ventilation and lights must be switched off. Touch and hold the — and + key for approximately 3 seconds. Wait for the lights to blink.

atag_hood_type3_wifi_step4.translation: Touch the – (minus) key to turn on Wi-Fi. The Wi-Fi indicator will turn on and speed levels 2 and 3 indicators will blink 3 times.

atag_hood_type3_wifi_step5.translation: After 3 seconds it will return to the Wi-Fi-menu.

atag_hood_type3_wifi_step6.translation: Touch the + (plus) key to enter the connection menu. Confirm with the timer key to start the 'Connection setup’. Speed level 2 indicator and Wi-Fi indicator will blink during the connection time. This mode will be disabled automatically after 5 minutes.

atag_hood_type3_pair_step2.translation: The ventilation and lights must be switched off. Touch and hold the — and + key for approximately 3 seconds. Wait for the lights to blink.

atag_hood_type3_pair_step3.translation: Press any key on the remote controller to enter the Wi-Fi configuration menu. Speed levels 2, 3 and 4 indicators light up.

atag_hood_type3_pair_step4.translation: Use + (plus) key to navigate to speed level 3 indicator.

hisense_rf_522_setup2.translation: Make sure that the big display of the refrigerator is showing the page below when you are binding the phone.

hisense_rf_628_setup1.translation: Set the appliance to normal operation. Touch the Wi-Fi icon for approximately 3 seconds. You entered network connection menu when" -- "appears in the display.

hisense_rf_628_setup2.translation: Touch the Fridge key to select " O " within 60 seconds.  Remark: " O " means that Wi-Fi is ready for connection. " P " means multi-user pairing,  " 88 " means unbinding, " -- " means that the function is not selected normally.

hisense_rf_628_pair_setup2.translation: Touch the Fridge key to select " P " within 60 seconds.  Remark: " O " means that Wi-Fi is ready for connection. " P " means multi-user pairing,  " 88 " means unbinding, " -- " means that the function is not selected normally.

hisense_rf_628_setup3.translation: Touch the Wi-Fi icon to confirm the selection mode. The Wi-Fi symbol starts blinking and the network of this appliance is now open to connect to, for 5 minutes.

hisense_rf_628_pair_setup3.translation: Touch the Wi-Fi icon to confirm the selection mode. The PAIR network of this appliance is now open to connect to, for 5 minutes.

hisense_rf_628_setup4.translation: When the Wi-Fi symbol is on, it means that the Wi-Fi connection is successful.The display will return to normal.

hisense_rf_628_pair_setup4.translation: When the display will return to normal, it means the PAIR connection is successful.

choose_an_oven_to_start.translation: Choose an oven to start baking this recipe:

atag_oven_cs_step_1.translation: Ensure that the device is turned on and set to normal operating conditions. Tap and hold the "Extra bake" key for 3 seconds to enter the settings menu.

atag_oven_cs_step_2.translation: Turn the central nob until you find "Conn" and confirm by pressing the knob.

atag_oven_cs_step_3.translation: Turn the central knob to select "WF" and confirm the selection.

atag_oven_cs_step_4.translation: In the Wi-Fi menu, use the central knob to switch to "On" and confirm.

atag_oven_cs_step_5.translation: In the "Conn" menu, turn the central knob to select the "SEt" setting. Confirm.

atag_oven_cs_step_6.translation:
Select the "On" in the "CSEt" menu and confirm by pressing the knob. The Wi-Fi symbol will flash at full intensity.
Click NEXT to continue.

hih_timer_hint.translation: If you have changed the filter, reset the timer to get accurate cleaning notifications.

go_to_your_oven_to_confirm.translation: Go to your oven to confirm.

atag_oven_p_step_3.translation: Turn the central knob to select "PAr" and confirm the selection.

atag_oven_p_step_4.translation: In the "PAIr" menu, use the central knob to select "PAr" and confirm by pressing the knob.

atag_oven_p_step_5.translation:
The pairing starts once the loading sliders become active.
Click NEXT to continue.

oven_atag_extras_fast_preheat_content.translation: With this function, the oven space quickly reaches the desired temperature.

oven_atag_extras_defrost_content.translation: With this function, the air circulates with the aid of the fan. No heat elements are on. Use this setting to defrost frozen dishes such as cakes, bread, and fruit.

oven_atag_extras_keep_warm_content.translation: This function keeps the cooked dishes warm.

oven_atag_extras_plate_warming_content.translation: This function is used to preheat tableware, so that the served food stays hot longer.

oven_atag_extras_steam_clean_content.translation: Stains get soaked and can easily be removed with a cloth once the Steam Clean program is finished.

oven_atag_extras_regenerate_content.translation: This function is used to regenerate precooked dishes.Through the use of steam,there is no loss of quality.Taste and texture are preserved as when freshly prepared.Different dishes can be prepared simultaneously.

preheat_will_be_hold.translation: Preheat temperature will be held for maximum 2 hours if the doors won’t be opened.

oven_atag_extra_air_tips.translation:
For healthy indulgences. Now you can have the crispiness and tastiness of fried food without the extra oils.
This method of intensive baking using hot air does not require any fat to ensure that perfect crunchy golden crust.
In combination with a special perforated baking tray (depending on the model) that lets the air flow all around the dish, you'll achieve even better results.
Suitable for small cuts of meat, fish, vegetables, and ready-made products, like french fries and chicken nuggets.

oven_atag_extra_frozen_tips.translation: This efficient baking program is the perfect choice for all frozen food and ready-made meals.

oven_atag_extra_auqa_tips.translation: AquaClean helps you keep your oven in pristine condition. All you need to do is pour half a liter of water into a baking tray and turn AquaClean on after each use. In just 30 minutes, the results are visible on the surface of the oven and baking trays. Stains and grease are softened and can easily wipe away.

oven_atag_extra_pizza_tips.translation: This program, with a baking temperature up to 300 °C, is specifically designed to help you bake the perfect pizza, focaccia, flatbread, and similar baked delicacies.

oven_atag_extra_gentle_tips.translation: This function is all about gentle, slow and even baking. This way, the moisture is locked inside and the food stays super tender and juicy. Suitable for preparing meat, fish or pastry on one level.

setting_have_sent.translation: Settings have been sent to oven!

wm_error_tips.translation: Current appliance is in Error state and cannot be set.

slowAging_content.translation: This setting is aimed to age wine gradually in a relatively cool and constant environment. Please make sure your wine is appropriate for slow aging and for how long.

storage_content.translation: This setting is as close as possible to authenthic wine cellar environment. It will be suitable for all kind of wines to store it safely for a longer period. They will age gradually.

fastAging_content.translation: This setting has the highest temperature to develop on a short period without long term negative effect. Suitable for fruity whites and light reds. Aging them longer is not beneficial.

light_describe.translation: Turn your lights ON or OFF. You can change the color and duration of the Light Switch in the Light Settings menu.

light_modes_content.translation: Light modes can be set and saved to use in different situations. In Light Usage, you can set which of these modes below should be active during events.

light_switch_content.translation: Light Switch allows you to quickly turn ON or OFF the lights on the appliance. Switch overwrites the other light modes. After the time period set on ‘Lights On For’ is over, the appliance goes back to the previous light modes behaviour.

light_shelf_content.translation: Set the light temperature and intensity of the shelf lights.

rgb_shelf_content.translation: Set the color and intensity of the shelf lights.

lights_for_time_content.translation: Set how long the lights of ## mode remain activated for.

light_ambient_content.translation: Ambient mode blends into the living space ambience. It will be activated when the door is closed.

light_functional_content.translation: Functional mode provides a clear view on the shelves and the Serving Area. It will be activated when the door is opened.

presence_sensor_content.translation: When movement near the wine cabinet is detected, the light behaves according to your settings below.

inventory_management_content.translation: Your Wine Climate Cabinet helps you to manage your wine inventory. It will automatically add the data of the scanned wines to the system. The bottle positions can be managed to be able to find a wine back after years of aging. Two systems are available for managing your inventory, so you can choose the ones that suits you best.

generic_positioning_content.translation: Lets you keep track of the shelves on which a wine is positioned. Not as detailed as “Exact positioning’’, but it will take less time to maintain.

general_sounds_content.translation: Set the volume you hear for general sounds.

exact_positioning_content.translation: Lets you keep track of the exact position of a bottle. Precise maintaining of the inventory is required. This will provide you with a detailed overview of all the wines.

alarm_sound_content.translation: Set the volume you hear in case of alarms.

key_sound_content.translation: Set the volume you hear when the keys on the cabinet display are pressed.

camera_content.translation: When camera is disabled, the wine data can only be added manually.

key_lock_content.translation: Set after how many minutes the display of the cabinet will lock automatically. Unlocking can be done by holding the key-lock key for 3 seconds.

zone_b_content.translation: Set how you’d like to use zone B.

eco_content.translation: Helps reduce energy consumption and saves electricity. Appliance will continue to operate, while extra functions like light, display, proximity and door sensor will be disabled.

sabbath_content.translation: Appliance will continue to operate, while extra functions like light, display, proximity and door sensor will be weekly disabled for 72 hours.

sabbath_content_sub.translation: To disable Sabbath mode, press key lock on the appliance display for 3 seconds.

humidity_measurement_content.translation: Humidity values can be monitored. Alarms will be given if humidity is out of range 40%-80%.

charcoal_filters_content.translation: When the charcoal filters are replaced,the countdown must be RESET to indicate the lifetime of the new filters.

filter_notification_content.translation: Set how many days in advance a notification is sent for cleaning the charcoal filters.

hum_box_content.translation:
The humidity box helps increase the humidity of the Wine Climate Cabinet. This prevents the humidity to drop under 50%, which can happen in certain conditions.


The humidity box is made of clay, a natural material with the right characteristics to first absorb water and then allow it to evaporate to increase humidity.

hum_box_how.translation: How to use the Humidity Box

hum_box_how_o.translation: Fill the box with 0,5 liter of water.

hum_box_how_t.translation: Place the humidity box in the cabinet.

hum_box_how_after.translation: After placing the Humidity box in the correct zone, it will take approximately 9 hours to increase the humidity back from 40% to 50%.  After 9 hours, humidity will continue to slowly increase.   On average, the Humidity Box should be refilled every 30 days.

empty_air_room.translation: Manage rooms to check and optimize air quality

hide_program_desc.translation: If activated it will make the program not visible on your device and app.

water_drain_desc.translation: This feature lets you choose what the appliance should do with the condensate water produced while drying. “Tank” means that this water is collected in the dedicated water tank and should be periodically emptied. “Drain” means that the user connected the appliance to a waste drain, so the water can be disposed of directly, bypassing the tank.

water_drain_tips.translation: This feature is initially set on the appliance. The default option selected on the appliance will be shown here.

drum_illumination_desc.translation: The Drum illumination illuminates the inside of the drum, which helps you when loading and emptying the machine - it is simply easier to see that remaining sock inside the drum. It also facilitates inspection when cleaning lifters and lifter inserts.

program_mode_desc.translation: Program mode allows you to customise your drying program and adjust it based on your needs. Below you can read about the different modes and their functionality.

program_mode_available.translation: The following washing modes are available:

program_mode_default_desc.translation: This mode is default and will not make any changes to your chosen program.

program_mode_disinfection_desc.translation: Drying mode with high temperature, extra dry. It kills up to 99.99 % of bacteria.

program_mode_delicate_desc.translation: Gentle agitation to prevent unnecessary wear and tear on the clothes.

bundling_detection_desc.translation: This function helps to ensure that clothes dry evenly and prevent the need for manual intervention to separate the clothes. By default it is always enabled but can be disabled here.

CL_CF_AB_about_cl_content.translation: ConnectLife is a comprehensive IoT platform that seamlessly integrates smart appliances from Hisense group brands, offering users the ability to control and monitor their devices remotely. It provides real-time notifications, automated after-sales support, and helpful assists for optimal appliance use. The platform emphasizes convenience, efficiency, and a personalized smart home experience, making everyday tasks simpler and more enjoyable. ConnectLife's ongoing evolution promises to expand its capabilities, further enhancing the modern smart home ecosystem.

CL_DV_OV_extra_drying_desc.translation: Drying or dehydrating food removes moisture from the food to improve shelf life. This is a recommended program. You can change it to your preference.

CL_DV_OV_extra_drying_herbs_desc.translation: Drying is the easiest method of preserving herbs. By using warm and dry air, the moisture evaporates. This helps the leaves, flowers or seeds to keep their color and flavor.

CL_DV_OV_extra_pasteurization_desc.translation: A mild heat treatment is applied to the food to kill harmful bacteria and extend shelf life. It can be used to preserve food such as diary products, egg products, nuts.

CL_DV_OV_extra_canning_desc.translation: Canning allows for preserving food from spoilage  sterilising with heat. Make sure the food is stored in containers that are hermetically sealed.

CL_DV_OV_extra_mircowave_defrost_desc.translation: An efficient program to quickly and safely defrost frozen foods. It’s particularly useful for a variety of foods, from meats and vegetables to pre-cooked meals.

CL_DV_OV_extra_stream_defrost_desc.translation: Thaws frozen foods effectively by combining gentle heat with the natural moisture of steam. The steam helps to maintain the food's moisture levels, preserving its texture and flavor. This is especially useful for delicate foods like fish, pastries, or bread.

CL_DV_OV_extra_fan_defrost_desc.translation: With this function, the air circulates with the aid of the fan. No heat elements are on. Use this setting to defrost frozen dishes such as cakes, bread, and fruit.

CL_DV_OV_extra_plate_warming_desc.translation: Heat the plates to the desired temperature. This helps the dishes on the plates remain warmer for a longer period of time.

CL_DV_OV_extra_oshibori_desc.translation: Gently warms oshibori hand towels, heating them to a comfortable temperature.

CL_DV_OV_extra_hot_stone_desc.translation: Designed for spa-like treatments. The stones are warmed evenly to the perfect temperature, making them ready for use in relaxation or wellness routines.

CL_DV_OV_extra_sterilizing_desc.translation: Sanitise items such as baby bottles, kitchen utensils, or small tools. The oven reaches temperatures sufficient to eliminate bacteria and other pathogens, providing a simple and effective way to maintain cleanliness and hygiene.

CL_DV_OV_extra_warming_regenerate_desc.translation: Uses steam to gently reheat food, restoring its moisture and freshness. Ideal for delicate dishes like pasta, rice, or casseroles, as it ensures that reheated food retains its original texture and flavor without becoming dry.

CL_DV_OV_extra_warming_hotair_stream_des.translation: Combining the benefits of both hot air and steam, this program is ideal for reheating a wide variety of foods. The hot air provides even heating, while the steam adds moisture, making it perfect for dishes like meat, poultry, or mixed meals, ensuring they stay juicy and flavorful.

CL_DV_OV_extra_warming_hotair_desc.translation: Perfect for foods that need a crisp exterior, this program uses hot air to evenly reheat dishes such as pizza, baked goods, or roasted vegetables. The circulating hot air ensures that food is heated thoroughly while maintaining a crispy finish.

CL_DV_OV_extra_warming_microwave_desc.translation: Quickly reheat food from the inside out. It’s a fast and efficient option to reheat meals. Perfect for soups, stews, or leftovers that need a quick warm-up.

CL_DV_OV_extra_warming_keepwarm_desc.translation: Maintain food at the perfect serving temperature without further cooking. Ideal for keeping dishes warm until they are ready to be served. It’s perfect for meals that are prepared ahead of time, ensuring they stay hot and ready to enjoy.

CL_DV_OV_extra_celsius_grill_plate_inner.translation: Enjoy the delicious, smoky flavors of grilled dishes without needing an outdoor grill. Crafted to distribute heat evenly across its entire area, minimising hot spots and ensuring consistent grilling results. Ideal for grilling a variety of foods, from meats and vegetables to seafood and even fruits.

CL_DV_OV_remote_start_content.translation: To send and start programs from your app, remote start should be active.

CL_DV_OV_defrost_detail_desc.translation: Correctly thawing foods ensures the quality of your food after it has been frozen. Proper defrosting reduces the risk of food poisoning.

CL_DV_OV_extra_non_food_detail_desc.translation: Non food programs are made for various non-culinary tasks, providing convenience and functionality beyond traditional cooking.

CL_DV_OV_extra_warming_detail_desc.translation: A range of warming programs for reheating and warming food, making it easy to enjoy meals, whether you're reheat leftovers or keeping dishes warm for serving.

air_care_helps.translation: Air care aims to solve the intelligent control of temperature, humidity and air in the whole house

air_care_helps_2_content.translation: Optimization can be started with one click. We provide five different optimization schemes. Each optimization mode can be adjusted according to user needs, providing users with customized optimization solutions.

air_care_helps_3_content.translation: Keep an eye on your room's status and appliances through a detailed 3D visualization of your home.

smart_laundry_helps.translation: Smart Laundry offers expert washing tips, an intuitive laundry assistant, and seamless detergent management, ensuring an unparalleled laundry experience

smart_kitchen_helps.translation: Smart Kitchen provides you with an unprecedented intelligent cooking experience, including intelligent recipes, wine pairings, recipe assistants, and ingredient, wine, and beverage management

smart_kitchen_helps_1_content.translation: Experience master's recipes in unique flavors when cooked in different ovens, which follow the recipe's cooking instructions with just one click.

smart_kitchen_helps_2_content.translation: Customize and generate recipes based on your personal preferences including nutrition, cuisines, lifestyle and allergies.

smart_kitchen_helps_3_content.translation: Add and view frequently-used ingredients details such as expiration date. Quickly match suitable food recipes and sent missing ingredients to shopping list.

smart_kitchen_helps_4_content.translation: Add drinks and create a drinking list, view detailed information of every single stored drinking.

smart_support_helps.translation: Smart Support provides comprehensive assistance for your devices.  You can get cleaning and care tips for daily maintenance, one-click self-diagnostic to check the status of all your devices and provide possible solutions for any abnormal operations

smart_support_helps_1_content.translation: Give suggestions for daily cleaning and maintenance of the product.

smart_support_helps_2_content.translation: One-click self-inspection to grasp the status of all household appliances. When a problem is detected, provide recommended solutions.

smart_support_helps_3_content.translation: When the device has a problem, users can self-help, troubleshoot and solve the problem according to the fault guide.

smart_support_helps_4_content.translation: If there are problems with the APP or product use, users can feedback online to reduce the communication time with the call center.

smart_support_helps_5_content.translation: Users can contact us through phone, email, and official website.

CL_DV_DW_odorcontrol_desp.translation: This will enable/disable odor control program on your program list. Odor control prevents bad odor from dirty dishes left in the dishwasher. When enabled the dishwashers fan is activated at regular intervals during a period of 72 hours. Note: To activate odor control you need to select the program from the program list. Only enabling it here will not run odor control.

CL_DV_OV_bio24_hot_air_desc.translation: The dish is heated by the hot air supplied from the rear of the oven. This function makes use of even heating and is ideal for baking on one or multiple levels.

CL_DV_OV_bio24_eco_hot_air_desc.translation: The dish is heated by the optimised heating system, so that less energy is used during the process. With this function, cooking requires a few extra minutes.

CL_DV_OV_bio24_top_bottom_heat_desc.translation: The dish is heated by the heating elements at the top and bottom of the oven space. This function is suitable for traditional baking and roasting.

CL_DV_OV_bio24_dry_hot_air_desc.translation: The dish is heated by the hot air supplied from the rear of the oven. This function makes use of even heating and is ideal for baking on one or multiple levels. With a specialized ventilation system, the air is kept dry, creating the perfect conditions for achieving a crispy exterior while ensuring even cooking throughout the interior.

CL_DV_OV_bio24_top70_bottom30_heat_desc.translation: The dish is heated by the heating elements at the top and bottom of the oven space. This function is ideal for dishes that require more heat from the top.

CL_DV_OV_bio24_top30_bottom70_heat_desc.translation: The dish is heated by the heating elements at the top and bottom of the oven space. This function is ideal for dishes that require more heat from the bottom.

CL_DV_OV_bio24_top_bottom_fan_desc.translation: The dish is heated by the top and bottom heating elements, with the heat evenly distributed by the fan. For even baking of dishes on one level and preparation of soufflés.

CL_DV_OV_hot_air_bottom_heat_desc.translation: The dish is heated with hot air and bottom heat. Ideal for single-level baking when we want dishes that are cooked quickly and have a crispy texture.

CL_DV_OV_bio24_air_fry_desc.translation: The dish is heated by the top heating element, with the heat evenly distributed by the fan. Suitable for smaller cuts of meat, fish, vegetables, and pre-prepared frozen items (fries, chicken nuggets).

CL_DV_OV_bio24_large_grill_desc.translation: The dish is heated by the large grill element. This function is used for dishes and baked food that require browning.

CL_DV_OV_bio24_large_grill_fan_desc.translation: The dish is heated by the large grill element in combination with the fan. This function is used to grill fish, meat and vegetables.

CL_DV_OV_bio24_bottom_heat_desc.translation: The dish is heated by the bottom heating element. Switch on this setting just before the end of the baking or roasting time. This function is used for dishes that require a bottom crust or browning.

CL_DV_OV_bio24_steam_desc.translation: The dish is cooked using steam, which preserves the aroma and flavour. There is no transfer of flavour/aroma, allowing different dishes to be cooked next to each other. Use this function to steam vegetables, eggs, fruit, pasta and rice.

CL_DV_OV_bio24_microwave_desc.translation: This function uses microwaves. Dishes are defrosted, heated or cooked quickly and efficiently.

CL_DV_OV_bio24_hot_air_steam_desc.translation: The dish is heated by the hot air supplied from the rear of the oven and evenly distributed with the fan. Addition of steam enhance moisture levels. Food gets crispy outside and tender inside. Ideal for baking meat and vegetables.

CL_DV_OV_bio24_top_bottom_fan_steam_desc.translation: The dish is heated by the top and bottom heating elements, with the heat evenly distributed by the fan. Addition of steam enhance moisture levels. Food gets crispy outside and tender inside. Ideal for baking bread and pastry.

CL_DV_OV_bio24_hot_air_microwave_desc.translation: The dish is cooked with a combination of microwaves and hot air. This shortens the cooking time. This function is used to cook meat loaf, potatoes, pastry and cakes.

CL_DV_OV_bio24_large_grill_fan_microwave.translation: The dish is cooked with a combination of microwave, grill and fan. This shortens the cooking time. Suitable for cooking potato gratin, chicken roast and smaller pieces of meat.

CL_DV_OV_bio24_top_bottom_fan_microwave_.translation: The dish is cooked with a combination of microwave, upper and bottom heat and fan. This shortens the cooking time. Suitable for cooking tarts, bread and larger pieces of meat.

CL_DV_OV_bio24_air_fry_microwave_desc.translation: The dish is cooked with a combination of microwave, top heat and fan. This shortens the cooking time. Suitable for cooking vegetables and frozen foods like lasagne.

CL_DV_OV_eco_mode_desc.translation: Eco Mode optimizes the appliance's performance to reduce energy consumption. It is designed to save energy and lower environmental impact by disabling extra functions like light, display, proximity and door sensor. It may slightly extend the duration of the process while maintaining optimal cooking performance.

CL_DV_OV_night_mode_desc.translation: Night mode helps create a more comfortable environment during nighttime hours by reducing display brightness, light brightness, and sound levels. You can customize each setting to suit your preferences and schedule night mode to automatically turn on and off at your chosen times.

CL_DV_OV_timelapse_video_desc.translation: The timelapse feature is currently active, capturing images throughout the oven program to create a video of the cooking process. Once the program is finished, the time-lapse will be available for viewing and downloading, allowing you to see the entire cooking process in a video format.

CL_DV_OV_descale_desc.translation: Descale program is active. Descaling is a cleaning process that removes mineral buildup, such as limescale, caused by hard water. Over time, these deposits can affect the performance and efficiency of your appliance. Regular descaling helps maintain optimal functionality, prolongs the lifespan of the appliance, and ensures consistent performance.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_EcoCotton.translation: Efficiently dries wet cotton laundry while optimizing energy consumption.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_StorageDryCotton.translation: Designed for drying thicker, multi-layered, non-sensitive cotton laundry. Leaves clothes completely dry.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_IronDryCotton.translation: Suitable for non-sensitive cotton laundry. After drying, the laundry will be slightly damp and ready for ironing.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_MixedLaundry.translation: Allows simultaneous drying of both cotton and synthetic fabrics.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_Delicates.translation: A gentle drying program for delicate laundry, which may remain slightly moist after drying. It is recommended to use a special-purpose laundry bag.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_Wool.translation: Designed for drying wool and garments according to manufacturer instructions specified on clothing labels. On some models, this program is intended for softening or fluffing wool items.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_Synthetic.translation: Suitable for drying synthetic and blended textiles.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_Beddings_Towels.translation: Ideal for drying larger items. When the program is complete, they will be fully dry.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_Down_Bulky Items.translation: Designed for drying textiles stuffed or padded with down, such as pillows, duvets, and jackets. Dry large items separately and use the extra dry function or time program if needed.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_QuickProCotton.translation: Suitable for drying small loads quickly and efficiently.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_TimeProgram.translation: Used for non-sensitive laundry that is still slightly moist and requires thorough drying. In the time program, remaining moisture is not detected automatically. If laundry is still damp after the cycle, repeat the program. If it becomes too dry and creased, the selected drying time was too long. Drying duration can be adjusted from 30 minutes to 4 hours in 15-minute increments.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_Activewear.translation: Ideal for drying clothing with a membrane, sportswear made of mixed materials, and breathable fabrics.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_Jeans.translation: Specifically designed for drying jeans and clothing with extra-thick seams.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_Shirts_Blouses.translation: A specialized program for drying shirts and blouses, with adjusted drum rotation to prevent creasing.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_Anti-Allergy.translation: Uses a longer drying duration and higher drying temperatures to reduce microbes and allergens on garments. This program is not suitable for delicate fabrics or items that are not machine-dryable.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_Waterproofing.translation: Optimizes thermal activation to improve the efficiency of impregnation agents on fabrics.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_SteamWrinkleCare.translation: Uses steam to remove creases from seasonal clothing or garments that need minimal ironing.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_SteamRefresh.translation: Refreshes laundry with steam, ideal for clothing that does not yet require a full wash.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_Airing.translation: A heater-free program designed to refresh clothes. The program duration can be adjusted from 15 minutes to 4 hours in 15-minute increments.

CL_DV_TD86_HY_DrumSanitize.translation: Cleans the drum, removing odors and bacteria. The drum must be empty before running this program.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Eco_40_60.translation: Use to clean normally soiled cotton laundry that is declared washable at 40°C or 60°C.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Normal_cotton.translation: Suitable for regular washing of up to a full load of normally soiled cotton clothing.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Normal.translation: A standard program for cleaning normally soiled cotton laundry.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Cotton.translation: Designed for miscellaneous cotton linens. Select a lower temperature for lightly soiled items and a higher temperature for heavily soiled garments.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Universal_Wash.translation: Ideal for heavily soiled laundry, both white and colored.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_White_Laundry.translation: Designed for heavily soiled white laundry. Select a lower temperature for less soiled items and a higher temperature for heavily soiled garments.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Coloured_laundry.translation: Suitable for washing colored laundry. Select a lower temperature for lightly soiled items and a higher temperature for heavily soiled garments.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Mix_Synthetic.translation: A program adapted for delicate clothing made from synthetic blends, viscose, or mixed fibers.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Wool_Hand wash.translation: A gentle program for wool, silk, and hand-washable garments. Uses minimal agitation to prevent damage. Select the appropriate temperature according to the clothing label.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Delicates.translation: Designed for delicate fabrics to minimize wear and tear while maintaining fabric quality and extending garment lifespan.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Sportswear.translation: Suitable for membrane fabrics, waterproof garments, or breathable fabrics that require gentle care.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Outerwear.translation: Recommended for washing winter jackets, coats, and heavily soiled outerwear.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Time_program.translation: Allows setting the wash duration between 20 minutes and 2 hours. Choose the appropriate time and temperature based on fabric type and soil level.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Jeans.translation: Protects the color of dark clothes and jeans by using optimized temperature and spin speeds.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Shirts_Blouses.translation: A gentle program for shirts and blouses that prevents creasing.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Beddings_Towels.translation: Ideal for washing large items such as bed sheets and towels, using extra water and additional rinsing for a thorough clean.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Down.translation: Designed for washing duvets, coats, vests, and jackets. Ensure the duvet is loaded properly to prevent contact with the machine’s glass door or rubber bellow.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Steam_refresh.translation: Refreshes clothing with steam, softening fabrics and reducing or eliminating the need for ironing.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Quick_PRO_Cotton.translation: A quick program for lightly soiled laundry.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Stain_Program.translation: Allows selection of fabric type and stain category, with the washing machine automatically adjusting the wash cycle for optimal results.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Waterproofing.translation: Designed for outdoor and microfiber clothing. Use with a waterproofing agent for best results.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Anti-Allergy Cotton.translation: Provides an anti-allergic and hygienic wash for cotton fabrics, using an intensive high-temperature cycle.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Anti_Allergy_Synthetics.translation: Suitable for synthetic fabrics needing an anti-allergy wash. Uses more water and includes an additional rinse.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Rinse.translation: A short rinse cycle with two cold rinses and a brief spin.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Spin.translation: A standalone spin cycle for removing excess water from laundry.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Drain.translation: A drain-only program to remove water from the machine without spinning.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Drum_cleaning.translation: Removes detergent residues and bacteria while cleaning the drum. Recommended at least once a month for machine maintenance.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Textile_Trainers.translation: A specialized program for washing trainers, using gentle movements and optimized spin speeds.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Soft_toys.translation: Designed for washing soft toys made of delicate fabrics, with gentle spin speeds and slow drum movements.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Underwear.translation: A gentle cycle for delicate underwear. Only wash a small number of garments at a time in a laundry net.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Swimwear.translation: A very gentle program for swimwear, using low temperatures and slow spin speeds to preserve fabric quality.

CL_DV_WM86_HY_Baby_clothes_Cotton.translation: Suitable for washing baby clothes, from lightly to heavily soiled garments. Select a lower temperature for less soiled items and a higher temperature for heavily soiled ones.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_DailyWash.translation: For your daily colored blends. A gentle touch to keep your garments vibrant and fresh effortlessly.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_Pillow.translation: Specifically designed for pillows and down-filled jackets, this program ensures meticulous cleaning and gentle care for your soft essentials.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_Jeans.translation: Tailored for washing jeans at a low temperature, this program ensures the perfect balance of care and cleanliness to keep your denim looking sharp and vibrant.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_NewClothes.translation: Initiate your new additions with this program featuring a refreshing touch and an extra rinse, ensuring your new garments receive the special care they deserve.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_DarkClothes.translation: Tailored exclusively for your dark garments, this program ensures a meticulous wash to keep your bold and rich hues looking sharp and stylish.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_KidsToys.translation: Dedicated to fluffy kid's toys, this program offers a gentle touch to ensure a thorough and caring wash, keeping your little one's favorite companions huggably soft and clean.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_Kids.translation: Specifically crafted for your little ones' clothes, this program combines gentle care with effective cleaning to keep your kid's garments looking bright and feeling soft, just as they should.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_Swimwear.translation: Tailored for delicate swimwear, this program expertly removes salt and prolongs fabric life, ensuring your beach-ready attire stays fresh and vibrant, dive after dive.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_Waterproof.translation: Impregnate your clothes for enhanced water resistance. Experience advanced protection, fortifying your garments against the elements for resilient wear.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_TihgtsStockingsLeggings.translation: Specifically designed for leggings, stockings, and tights, this program provides a gentle yet thorough wash to keep your delicate legwear looking flawless and feeling fabulous.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_Lingerie.translation: Designed for your delicate lingerie, this program combines gentle care with thorough cleaning to keep your intimate garments feeling soft, fresh, and beautifully maintained.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_KitchenProgram.translation: Dedicated to removing foul odors from cooking, this program ensures your kitchen textiles emerge revitalized and free from lingering scents, making every culinary experience a breath of fresh air.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_Whitening.translation: A dedicated program for brightening and whitening your clothes, ensuring they emerge brilliantly clean and revitalized.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_Activewear.translation: A delicate spin and swift final cycle for your sportswear, ensuring a clean and refreshed ensemble for your next workout.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_Curtains.translation: Revitalize your curtains with this program, ensuring a thorough cleanse while preserving fabric integrity for a fresh, renewed look.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_Hygiene.translation: For delicate cotton garments and allergies, this program prioritizes thorough cleaning with special care.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_Baby.translation: Specially crafted program for washing baby clothes, prioritizing gentle care to keep your little one's garments soft, clean, and safe for delicate skin.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_Pets.translation: Specifically designed for pet-related items, this program ensures effective cleaning while prioritizing the special care required for your furry friend's belongings.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_Sports.translation: A delicate spin and swift final cycle for your sportswear, ensuring a clean and refreshed ensemble for your next workout.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_Stains.translation: An effective program dedicated to tackling stubborn stains, ensuring your garments receive thorough cleansing for a spotless and refreshed appearance.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_SteamRefresh.translation: A quick and efficient program designed to refresh your garments using the power of steam, leaving them revitalized and ready to wear.

CL_DV_WM23ADS_HY_AirDry.translation: Designed to dry your washing machine's interior and detergent drawer without laundry, reducing mold and microbial growth for odor-free clothes.

ios_widget_extension_devices_content.translation:
Tap the widget to go to the "Devices" tab of ConnectLife.

Long press the widget and tap "Edit widget" to manage the devices, you can select a new device to display in the widget or replace the device that is already in the widget, and adjust the order between them for the widget that supports multiple devices. For devices that have been added to the widget, you can quickly check their status.

If the device supports shortcut-switch, a button that supports shortcut-switch is additionally displayed in the widget. Other devices can be added to "Routines" for shortcut-switch and other complex operations.

ios_widget_extension_room_content.translation:
Tap the widget to go to the "Air Care" page of ConnectLife.

Long press the widget and tap "Edit widget" to manage the Rooms, please refer to the "Devices" section for specific operations.

This can be useful for the different people within a household, friends, or specific occasions.

Ingredients can have colors. This is what it means:

Ingredients that will potentially be part of the recipe are shown in grey.
Ingredients that should <u>not</u> appear in in the recipe are shown in red.
You can select ingredients that <u>must</u> be used in the recipe by making them mandatory. Mandatory ingredients are shown in green.

CL_HO_DS_004_content.translation:
ConnectLife links all your devices, from major to small domestic appliances, creating the smart home platform for brands under the Hisense Group umbrella—namely, Hisense, Gorenje, ASKO, and ATAG.  With that, it removes any challenge of managing all your devices at once, making it as easy as swiping a finger. It gives the power to you and provides you with a new and unique smart home experience.

Hisense offers a diverse range of connected appliances appliances, from refrigerators to air conditioners, carefully designed to elevate and simplify your daily life. With ConnectLife, take the full potential of these devices for a more efficient smart home experience. Learn more about Hisense product here. 
 

Specializing in premium home appliances, featuring premium kitchen devices and more, ASKO and ATAG elevate your home with a timeless quality, effortlessly controlled and monitored through ConnectLife.  

Learn more about Asko products here  and discover Atag here. 

Gorenje, with a rich tradition of crafting durable and high-quality home appliances, brings simplicity and intuition to your daily life. Now, with ConnectLife, enjoy the convenience of Gorenje products easier than ever!
Learn more about Gorenje products here.

CL_HO_DS_001_content.translation:
The use of smart, connected devices is increasing as more and more users are opting for connectivity to simplify their daily tasks. With that begins a new era of connected devices that bring greater convenience and efficiency to our lives. Here comes ConnectLife, a smart home platform that gives you full control of your devices. Imagine the freedom to manage your devices with your smartphone or tablet from anywhere—whether it's preheating the oven on your way home or starting the dishwasher without being in the kitchen. It's not just a time-saver; it's a new way to make life more efficient and carefree.

Connected devices also help to be mindful of energy and resource usage, leading to potential savings on energy bills. Keep tabs on your energy consumption and make adjustments as needed – run your washing machine during off-peak hours or set appliances to turn off automatically when not in use.

Customization is another perk offered by connected devices. With smart devices, you can create schedules and automation that suit your preferences and lifestyle. Set your air conditioner to turn on before you get home and turn it off as you go to bed, improving comfort and energy savings. Additionally, devices receive software updates, improving their performance and functionality over time.

Connected devices bring improvement in customer service as well – technicians can identify and troubleshoot issues remotely. It simplifies troubleshooting and brings quick feedback from service technicians.

In summary, connected devices, together with ConnectLife, bring a range of benefits. From increased convenience to improved energy efficiency and safety, these devices simplify our lives, saving us time and energy. As ConnectLife continues to evolve, we can look forward to more innovative ideas and devices that make our lives even more convenient and efficient.

CL_HO_DS_003_title.translation: Connected experience for the whole family

CL_HO_DS_003_content.translation:
ConnectLife is specifically designed to manage household devices such as kitchen devices, washers, dryers, wine climate cabinets, and more. The platform connects to a wide range of connected devices that enable you to monitor and control your household from anywhere using your smartphone.
But ConnectLife is more than just a device manager; it creates a shared experience for the entire family. By collaborating and using the platform together, everyone can manage the home, stay informed and keep things running smoothly. It's particularly beneficial for busy families or those caring for elderly relatives or children.


One of the most significant advantages of ConnectLife is its user-friendly interface. With straightforward instructions, anyone in the family can use it, regardless of their technical abilities. Moreover, you can customize the platform to fit your family's specific needs, adding or removing appliances as necessary.
In conclusion, ConnectLife is a smart living platform that provides a unique way for families to stay connected and manage their homes. By connecting your home devices to ConnectLife, you can ensure that everything runs seamlessly, even when you are away. So start using the ConnectLife app today and discover the benefits of a connected household.

how_use_content.translation:
Devices
The "Device" tab simplifies device management by consolidating all connected devices in one place. After creating a ConnectLife account, you can effortlessly connect your devices using the "Add device" or the "+" button. Once connected, you can monitor and control each device's activity from the list of connected devices. You can customize device settings, access user manuals, and unpair them if necessary.

Automation
In the "Automation" tab, you can establish automated routines with your connected devices using various triggers such as manual, time-based, or device status.

Menu
The "Menu" tab gives you access to different settings and options for the ConnectLife app and your devices. Here you can edit your profile information, manage all your rooms and devices, access user manuals, and update device firmware. With ConnectLife, you can easily customize your experience and get the most out of your devices

The "+" button
The "+" button in the ConnectLife app is a quick way to add new devices and access user manuals. Simply click the "+" button, select the device you want to add, and follow the on-screen instructions to connect it to the app. It helps you quickly expand your home and get control over your connected devices.

Device sharing
Quickly and easily share your connected devices with family and friends using the "Share device" function. 
Select the device you want to share and tap the "share" icon in the upper right corner of the screen. 
Enter the recipient account e-mail address in the pop-up window. The recipient will receive an e-mail notifying them of access to your device.

Dear User:
We are very sorry that you have chosen to cancel your ConnectLife Asia-Pacific account.
Before you confirm the account cancellation, please carefully read this "Account Cancellation Agreement" (hereinafter referred to as the "Cancellation Agreement"), especially the bolded clauses. If you do not agree to any of the terms and conditions of this agreement, please immediately stop the cancellation process.
We kindly remind you that canceling your account will bring many inconveniences to your after-sales rights protection, and after the account is cancelled, except as otherwise provided by law, we will process your personal information by deletion or anonymization. Your account and account-related data will not be recovered, so please cancel it carefully.

1. The ConnectLife Asia-Pacific account you have applied to cancel is provided with unified account services by Hisense Platform. The ConnectLife Asia-Pacific account, which is also the Hisense account, should be an account registered by you in accordance with the agreement with Hisense's relevant websites or mobile application terminals and provided to you personally by Hisense. You shall ensure that you have the right to decide on the cancellation of this account, and shall not infringe upon the legitimate rights and interests of any third party. If any complaints or disputes arise as a result, you shall bear the responsibility and indemnify Hisense Platform from liability.

2. To safeguard your rights and account security, your account must meet the following conditions simultaneously to complete self-service cancellation through the ConnectLife Asia-Pacific App's cancellation function:
(1) The account has no rights or assets within the valid period, or even if there are, you voluntarily give up: including but not limited to points, coupons, renewal relationships, VIP rights, single point coupons, home appliance extended warranty and other rights and account assets.
(2) Account is in a secure state: There have been no sensitive operations such as modifying the mobile phone number or account password in the past 15 days.
(3) The account has no outstanding orders, services, or other transactions: There are no outstanding orders, after-sales orders, refund orders, unclosed tickets, orders awaiting service or incomplete service, and no outstanding payments to the platform, participation in various platform activities, or incomplete matters such as points redemption.
If the above conditions are not met, you can apply for manual assistance to cancel through the customer service.

3. Once an account is cancelled, it cannot be restored. Except as otherwise provided by law, your personal information and relevant data will be deleted or anonymized in Hisense's backend system and will no longer be retrievable or accessible. Before cancellation, please back up and properly retain your account information and other relevant data on your own, and properly preserve materials such as transaction vouchers and invoices for products and services to avoid being unable to enjoy relevant after-sales services or incurring additional fees.

4. Since Hisense Platform provides you with unified account services, after canceling your account, you will no longer be able to use this account, and Hisense Home APP, Hisense Home official account, Hisense Home mini-program, TV-side Juhaokan account, Hisense official mall mini-program, Hisense official mall App, Hisense official mall PC Client, Hisense Points Paradise PC Client, TV Micro Assistant, Juhouxue App and other Hisense Platform accounts will also be canceled together, and you will not be able to retrieve your account or any content or information related to the account, including but not limited to:

(3) You will no longer enjoy all virtual assets, rights, and privileges that you had prior to account cancellation, including but not limited to membership privileges, coupons, gift cards, points, VIP rights, single-point vouchers, and other cards and vouchers, etc.
You understand and agree that Hisense is unable to assist you in restoring the aforementioned services. Before submitting a cancellation application, please make sure to first understand the information of other relevant accounts you need to unbind, as well as related rights, assets, etc. You can contact our customer service for details.

5. If your account is involved in disputes or controversies during its use and cancellation, including but not limited to complaints, reports, litigation, arbitration, investigations by state authorities with jurisdiction, etc., Hisense reserves the right to terminate the cancellation of this account.

6. Canceling this account does not mean that the account's actions and related responsibilities prior to cancellation are waived or mitigated. If you have engaged in any improper actions such as violations of laws and regulations during your use of the Hisense account, Hisense reserves the right to pursue liability for the illegal and improper actions prior to the cancellation of your account.

7. You shall follow the process publicly announced by Hisense to cancel your Hisense account, and you hereby undertake that once the account cancellation application is submitted, you will not request Hisense to revoke it for any reason.

Auto-Defrost clean is a pre-set cleaning function.
When using this mode, due to room temperature changes and the thermal expansion and contraction sounds generated by cleaning, the system may misjudge the presence of someone in the room as no one being present.
When a person is outside the sensor's detection range, or remains in a completely motionless state for an extended period (such as due to deep sleep) for more than 60 minutes, it will be determined as an unoccupied state.

CL_DV_RF_ice_maker_cleaning_desc.translation:
1.Before cleaning:
- Remove any ice from the ice bin and fill the water tank with water.
- Make sure the refrigerator and freezer doors are closed.
After completing the above, start the ice maker’s cleaning function.
2.During cleaning:
- A single cleaning cycle takes about 2 minutes. Ice making will pause during this time. Please wait until cleaning is complete.
3.After cleaning:
- Empty any remaining water from the ice bin and clean the bin before restarting ice making to avoid contaminating new ice.
- When cleaning ends, the unit will automatically switch to normal ice-making mode. If you do not need to continue making ice, please turn off the ice maker.

CL_DV_RF_ice_maker_cleaning_precautions_.translation: Before cleaning, please carefully review the cleaning precautions in 'Learn more' section and make the necessary preparations. The cleaning process takes approximately 2 minutes. Once completed, promptly clean the ice tray to avoid contamination of the ice during the ice-making process.

CL_DV_EY_learn_about_logic_desc_footer.translation: All adjustments are temporary and will automatically revert to your original settings once the period ends. You can also manually override them at any time.

CL_CF_energy_help_content_bold_1.translation: The device will operate in its Eco mode under different conditions: Always Eco: Enters Eco mode directly when the device turns on. Peak-hour Eco: Automatically switches to Eco mode when the device starts during peak electricity pricing hours. Smart Budget Eco: Automatically activates Eco mode when your electricity usage reaches the monthly or weekly target.

CL_CF_energy_help_content_2.translation: In the season of sufficient light, there is still surplus power after solar power is used for uncontrollable loads. You can connect the heat pump to the energy management system to consume excess green electricity to save household expenses.

CL_DV_WINE_easy_serve_des.translation:
Top Zone: Red wine: optimal temperature range for serving red wine. 

Middle Zone: White wine: optimal temperature range for serving white wine.  

Bottom Zone: Sparkling wine: optimal temperature range for serving sparkling wine. 

Best for: Hosts, entertainers, or anyone who wants all wine types immediately ready to serve. Perfect for dinners or tastings.

CL_DV_WINE_serve_store_desc.translation:
Top Zone: Red wine: optimal temperature range for serving red wine.

Middle Zone: White wine: optimal temperature range for serving white and sparkling wine.

Bottom Zone: Long-term storage temperature, ideal for aging wine.

Best for: A practical mix of serving and aging. People who regularly drink red and white wine but also want to store bottles.

CL_DV_WINE_stable_desc.translation:
Top Zone: Long-term storage temperature, ideal for aging wine.

Middle Zone: Freely adjustable, bring one bottle to serving temperature or keep a temporary selection ready.

Bottom Zone: Long-term storage temperature, ideal for aging wine.

Best for: Collectors or casual users who mainly store wine long-term and occasionally want to enjoy a bottle at the right temperature.
